releaseNotes: Version 1.0.0 build 113: improves PolyWAV production WAV transcription by preferring dedicated BOOM/LAV channels over MixL/MixR channels, disabling prompt injection for multi-channel WAV sources, and using a stricter no-speech threshold to reduce hallucinations, while keeping Burned MP4 export, SRT QA issue examples, Lithuanian/English output, offline setup, and update checking.
